title: Shattering Light Jamaican Prawns Skewers
description: Enjoy the flavors of Jamaica in these light and refreshing prawn skewers, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is wine-pairing friendly and kosher compliant.

ingredients.name: Wooden skewers
ingredients.notes: soaked in water for 30 minutes before use

instructions: Thread the prawns and vegetables onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Soak the wooden skewers in water for at least 30 minutes before use to prevent them from burning on the grill.
Heat the robata grill to medium-high heat, or set up your grill for direct heat with the heat plates at 400F.
Thread the prawns and vegetables onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix the pineapple juice, coconut milk, ginger, garlic, allspice, thyme and cayenne pepper (if using).
Brush the mixture onto the prawns and vegetables.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the prawns are pink and the vegetables are tender.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs and a squeeze of lime juice.
Serve hot with steamed rice or roti.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
